title: lasthenia obtusifolia var. bridgesii
intro: Lasthenia obtusifolia var. bridgesii, also known as California goldfields, is a perennial wildflower native to California and Baja California, Mexico. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Lasthenia obtusifolia var. bridgesii include its potential to soothe skin irritations, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made by infusing its leaves in hot water to create a tea, or by using its flowers and leaves in a topical salve or ointment.
